ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rated" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Plot summary of the movie */,
  "poster" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "production" TEXT /* Production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the movie website */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the movie */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDB votes */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of main actors in the movie */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the movie has won */,
  "trivia" TEXT /* Interesting trivia about the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A tagline or catchphrase for the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie in dollars */,
  "language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications or age ratings in different countries */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* List of production companies involved in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's genre preferences (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity on the platform */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's subscription */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the user gave the rating */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the movie to their watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist entry (e.g., To Watch, Watched) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the movie */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the viewing session in minutes */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the movie (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the movie was viewed (e.g., Home, Office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
